svg.text: Anthropic's hosted AI design surface — the thing genie is inspired by. Understanding the mechanics before we design our own.

g.text: ① THE BIG PICTURE — TWO HALVES
Claude Design is split into a hosted half Anthropic keeps, and a portable half that's observable on disk.
Locked behind the subscription. No public API. Cannot be reproduced.
The visual canvas — drag, marquee-select, inline comments
The generation prompt — how it turns words into components
The per-element edit protocol — knobs, the comment loop
The developer-facing contract — visible in the bundled Claude Code skill.
The file-tree contract — how a "project" maps to files
The @dsCard marker — first-line comment that registers a card
The _ds_sync.json anchor — verification of what was written
The atomic upload sequence (the load-bearing dance)
② THE WORKFLOW — TWO SLASH COMMANDS
Inside Claude Code, two commands bridge your repo and the hosted canvas.
pull your system → a Claude Design project
/design — work the canvas from Claude Code
round-trips back into your repo as @dsCard-marked HTML cards
③ THE DESIGNSYNC PROTOCOL — A CAPABILITY-GATED FILE FLOW
12 verbs, but one idea: read freely, then ask once for permission to write.
WRITE — only within the granted plan
⚠ any path outside the plan's globs is rejected
Why it's clever: there's exactly one user-visible permission boundary. You see the plan, approve it once, and every write after is constrained to what you granted.
④ THE @dsCard MARKER — HOW A FILE BECOMES A CARD
One HTML comment on the first line turns a preview file into an indexed component.
↑ MUST be line 1 — the server reads only the first line to index it
THE EXACT VALIDATOR (from the bundled skill)
⑤ THE ATOMIC UPLOAD SEQUENCE — THE LOAD-BEARING DANCE
The order is not obvious — and getting it wrong corrupts the project. This is the hardest-won detail.
The point: if the connection drops mid-upload, the anchor (_ds_sync.json) was never written — so the server knows the tree is incomplete and won't vouch for missing files.
⑥ WHAT THIS MEANS FOR genie
The techniques are knowable. The conventions are theirs. genie takes the first, invents the second.
THE TECHNIQUES genie BORROWS (ideas, not code)
✦ A server-compiled manifest from in-file markers
→ its own resource URI scheme (not ds://)
→ and improvements where the original is awkward

svg.text: genie · explainer · how Claude Design works · the inspiration, not the target · concepts & techniques only — own conventions
